name: Double Chocolate Refrigerator Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine flour, baking powder, salt, baking soda, and cinnamon; set aside.
2. Cream butter or margarine and sugars together.
3. Beat in the melted chocolate, egg, and vanilla until light and fluffy.
4. Stir in the flour mixture and chocolate chips just until blended.
5. Shape into three 8-inch rolls. If the dough is too soft, chill slightly before rolling.
6. Wrap the rolls tightly in waxed paper or plastic wrap, then with aluminum foil.
7. Chill several hours or overnight.
8. Preheat oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
9. Cut the rolls into 1/4-inch slices using a sharp knife.
10. Bake on an ungreased baking sheet for 8 to 10 minutes.
11. Cool on a wire rack.
Note: If the rolls are wrapped tightly, they will keep refrigerated for a week to 10 days or frozen for 2 months.
